question.content: For the amplifier, compute the quiescent point and dynamic parameters, determine first distortion type for no-load and 3 kOhm load, and update parameters when C3 is open. Use distortion code 1 for saturation-first and 2 for cutoff-first. Output exactly eleven comma-separated values in the order IBQ_mA,ICQ_mA,UCEQ_V,Aa,Ri_kOhm,Ro_kOhm,Aav,no_load_code,load_code,Aa_C3open,Ri_C3open_kOhm, plain ASCII only, no Chinese characters, no unit text, no percent sign, no fraction, no equation form, and no extra text.

step_1.content: Write DC equations for Q-point, then use small-signal model for gain and resistances with/without C3 bypass.
step_1.key_point: Write DC equations for Q-point, then use small-signal model for gain and resistances with/without C3 bypass.

step_3.content: Analyze panel 1 of 3 and record the intermediate relation needed before moving to the next panel.
step_3.key_point: Set up the governing relation for the quiescent point and dynamic parameters.

step_5.content: Analyze panel 2 of 3 and record the intermediate relation needed before moving to the next panel.
step_5.key_point: Transform the relation and isolate the quiescent point and dynamic parameters.

step_7.content: Return all requested numeric outputs in the required order.
step_7.key_point: Return all requested numeric outputs in the required order.
